span.p:
Super Block
(backup copies in groups
0, 1, 3, 5, 7...)
struct ext2_super_block

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Group Descriptors
(block bitmap location
inode bitmap location
inode table location
free counts)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Block Bitmap
(1 bit per data block
0=free 1=used)

span.p:
Inode Table
(struct ext2_inode array
each inode 128 bytes)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Data Blocks
(actual file content
directory entries
indirect blocks)

span.p:
i_block[15] data block pointers
[0..11]: 12 direct blocks
[12]: single indirect
[13]: double indirect
[14]: triple indirect
